description: Recommended RAG study corpus for capstone 01. Ingest one at a time or run: python capstone_01_ingest.py --corpus

sources.title: LangChain: A framework for building LLM-powered apps (course paper)
Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP (Lewis et al.)
Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain QA (Karpukhin et al.)
Lost in the Middle: How LLMs Use Long Context (Liu et al.)

web_phase2.title: LangChain RAG concepts (HTML — use WebBaseLoader in a later bite)

local_suggestions: Export your own study notes or TRAINING_LOG highlights to PDF → ingest with a file path
Course deck PDFs you save under capstone/data/pdfs/ (kept out of git)
